summary: SportLyo Phase A Event Features - FULLY TESTED AND WORKING. Backend: All 14 pytest tests passed. Frontend: Multi-step event creation dialog working with T-shirt checkbox, regulations PDF upload, race management with descriptions and up/down reordering. Event cards show Publie/Brouillon badges and publish/unpublish toggle buttons. Public /events page only shows published events (verified via API and UI).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (width/height -1) when charts container not properly sized - cosmetic issue only

passed_tests: Backend: Organizer login (club@paris-sport.fr / club123) - 200 OK
Backend: Admin login (admin@sportsconnect.fr / admin123) - 200 OK
Backend: POST /api/events with regulations_pdf_url, published=false, provides_tshirt=true fields
Backend: Event published defaults to false when not provided
Backend: Event provides_tshirt defaults to true when not provided
Backend: GET /api/events only returns published=true events (query includes 'published': True)
Backend: GET /api/organizer/events returns ALL events (published and unpublished)
Backend: PUT /api/events/{event_id}/publish sets published=true
Backend: PUT /api/events/{event_id}/publish sets published=false (unpublish)
Backend: Event races with description field saved correctly
Backend: Admin notified on new event creation (notification created in DB)
Backend: PUT /api/events/{event_id} updates regulations_pdf_url
Backend: PUT /api/events/{event_id} updates provides_tshirt field
Frontend: Organizer dashboard loads with hub navigation grid
Frontend: Create event dialog opens with multi-step form (SPORT & LIEU, CONFIGURATION, PARCOURS & VISUELS, ÉPREUVES)
Frontend: T-shirt checkbox exists in create event form (provides_tshirt field)
Frontend: Regulations PDF upload field exists in create event form
Frontend: Add race button adds new race to event
Frontend: Race form includes description textarea field
Frontend: Race up/down arrows for reordering visible
Frontend: Event cards show 'PUBLIE' badge (orange) for published events
Frontend: Event cards show 'BROUILLON' badge (gray) for draft events
Frontend: Publish/Depublier toggle button on each event card
Frontend: Clicking publish toggle shows success toast
Frontend: Public /events page shows only published events (12 events)
Frontend: API /api/events returns only published events
Frontend: Admin dashboard loads successfully
critical_code_review_comments: Console warnings in OrganizerDashboard.js about chart dimensions - not critical but should be addressed for cleaner console
seed_data_creation: Test events with TEST_ prefix created and cleaned up in pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A fully tested. Key code locations: OrganizerDashboard.js - lines 2610-2750 (create event dialog), lines 2760-2830 (edit dialog), lines 981-991 (publish toggle), lines 572-590 (race management functions). Backend events.py - lines 73-174 (POST /api/events), lines 189-209 (PUT /api/events/{id}/publish). The EventCreate model in models.py includes regulations_pdf_url, published (default=False), provides_tshirt (default=True). RaceConfig model includes description field.

fields: regulations_pdf_url - string field for PDF URL

publish_unpublish.ui_element: Toggle button on event cards with Publier/Depublier text

admin_notifications.trigger: New event creation notifies all admins
